snippets.description:
DetachServiceProjectAttachment detaches a service project from a host project.
You can call this API from any service project without needing access to
the host project that it is attached to.
snippets.title: apphub DetachServiceProjectAttachment Sample

GetIamPolicy gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy
if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

snippets.description:
LookupDiscoveredService lists a Discovered Service in a host project and location, with a
given resource URI.

snippets.description:
LookupDiscoveredWorkload lists a Discovered Workload in a host project and location, with a

snippets.description:
LookupServiceProjectAttachment lists a service project attachment for a given service project. You can
call this API from any project to find if it is attached to a host project.
snippets.title: apphub LookupServiceProjectAttachment Sample

snippets.description:
SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces
any existing policy.

Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED`
errors.
snippets.title: apphub SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description:
TestIamPermissions returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the
resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of
permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error.

Note: This operation is designed to be used for building
permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization
checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
snippets.title: apphub TestIamPermissions Sample
